treatments.name: Scalp Micropigmentation (SMP)
treatments.short_description: A non-surgical treatment that uses micro-dots of pigment to recreate the look of fuller hair.
treatments.full_description: Scalp micropigmentation (SMP) is a non-invasive cosmetic procedure that uses tiny, layered dots in different hues of black to replicate the look of a shadow on your scalp. It can restore the appearance of a natural hairline, add density to thinning areas, and camouflage scars from previous hair transplant surgeries.

treatments.name: FUE Hair Transplant
treatments.short_description: A minimally invasive surgical transplant that relocates individual hair follicles to thinning or bald areas.
treatments.full_description: Follicular Unit Extraction (FUE) is a hair transplant technique that involves harvesting individual follicular units from the donor area and implanting them into thinning or balding regions. It offers natural-looking results with tiny, dot-like scars in the donor area and a recovery time typically measured in days.

treatments.name: PRP Scalp Therapy
treatments.short_description: Platelet-rich plasma injections to stimulate hair follicles and support hair growth.
treatments.full_description: PRP scalp therapy uses a concentration of platelets derived from your own blood to stimulate dormant hair follicles and support healthier, thicker hair growth. It is often used as a complementary treatment to SMP or hair transplant surgery.

treatments.name: Custom Hair Restoration Plan
treatments.short_description: A tailored combination of services such as SMP, PRP, and medications based on your needs.
treatments.full_description: For patients who benefit from a hybrid approach, we create custom treatment plans that may include SMP, PRP therapy, medical management, and lifestyle recommendations. Pricing and session counts vary based on the specific combination of treatments.

gallery_cases.title: SMP Hairline + Crown Rebuild for 33-Year-Old Male
gallery_cases.case_notes: Three-session SMP plan focused on softening the frontal hairline and blending density into the crown. Final result shows a natural, low-maintenance buzz-cut look.

gallery_cases.title: Soft Hairline SMP for 37-Year-Old Male (Norwood 3–4)
gallery_cases.case_notes: Patient requested a conservative, age-appropriate hairline with added crown density. Completed in two main sessions plus one refinement.

gallery_cases.title: SMP Density for 30-Year-Old With Receding Hairline and Crown
gallery_cases.case_notes: Ideal candidate for SMP with minimal remaining hair. Focused on rebuilding frontal frame and filling in a thinning crown.

gallery_cases.title: Barber-Blend SMP for 35-Year-Old Male
gallery_cases.case_notes: Created a sharper, more defined hairline with subtle temple work and blended crown density. Designed to pair with a regular skin fade.

gallery_cases.title: SMP Hairline Restoration for 38-Year-Old Office Professional
gallery_cases.case_notes: Patient wanted minimal downtime and no surgery. SMP provided a fuller frame to his face with subtle, broken hairline design.

gallery_cases.title: Early Recession SMP for 29-Year-Old Male
gallery_cases.case_notes: Subtle hairline reinforcement for early recession without altering overall style.

gallery_cases.title: SMP Density for 32-Year-Old Female With Diffuse Thinning
gallery_cases.case_notes: Micro-density SMP between longer hair to reduce contrast of visible scalp.

gallery_cases.title: FUE Hairline and Temple Rebuild for 41-Year-Old Male
gallery_cases.case_notes: Single-session FUE procedure of 2,400 grafts focused on hairline and mid-scalp.

gallery_cases.title: Crown-Focused FUE for 52-Year-Old Male
gallery_cases.case_notes: Combined crown and mid-scalp grafting with conservative hairline.

gallery_cases.title: PRP Maintenance for 44-Year-Old Female With Diffuse Thinning
gallery_cases.case_notes: Series of six PRP sessions combined with topical treatments to improve density.

gallery_cases.title: SMP Scar Camouflage for 36-Year-Old Male (FUT Scar)
gallery_cases.case_notes: Linear FUT scar on occipital scalp blended with SMP to match surrounding follicles.

gallery_cases.title: Combined FUE + SMP for 39-Year-Old Male
gallery_cases.case_notes: Strategic FUE to hairline with SMP to increase coverage on mid-scalp and crown.

practitioners.bio: Maya is a senior SMP specialist with a background in medical aesthetics. She focuses on soft hairlines, natural density work, and scar camouflage.
Elijah specializes in SMP for male pattern baldness and frequently helps patients compare SMP with FUE hair transplant options.
Sam focuses on subtle SMP density work for both men and women, with an emphasis on conservative, age-appropriate designs.
Dr. Patel is a hair restoration physician offering FUE surgery as well as combination FUE + SMP treatment plans.
Lucas is known for his detailed consultations and focus on SMP aftercare, helping clients maintain long-lasting results.
Dr. Hart performs FUE hair transplants and PRP therapy, often integrating both into custom treatment plans.
Amir focuses on SMP for donor scars and post-transplant density, working closely with FUE surgeons for combined outcomes.
Rachel is an SMP artist known for creating soft hairlines and natural temple work for both men and women.
Dr. Cho specializes in high-density FUE procedures and corrective work for previous transplants.
Sofia offers SMP and PRP therapy with an emphasis on subtle, undetectable results for professional clients.
Dr. Stone performs both FUE and SMP, helping patients choose the most cost-effective option for their goals.
Founding partner and former FUE surgeon, now retired from clinical practice.

treatment_packages.name: SMP Hairline + Crown Value Plan (2–3 Sessions)
